# ICT — Information & Communication Technology W.L.L

> ICT is a digital transformation partner in Doha, Qatar. Since 2005 we have helped
> organisations modernise their infrastructure, secure it, and put their data and AI
> to work. We advise, build, and run, and stay accountable for the outcome.
> Note: figures marked for verification (founding year, partner counts, Partner ID)
> should be confirmed against a primary source before external citation.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.ict.com.qa/): What ICT does, services, AI and data, industries, partners.
- [Company](https://www.ict.com.qa/company): Story since 2005, vision, mission, values, leadership.
- [Services](https://www.ict.com.qa/services): Eight service pillars, one partner across the lifecycle.
- [AI & Data](https://www.ict.com.qa/ai-data): Enterprise AI, analytics, agentic systems, responsible AI.
- [Emerging Tech](https://www.ict.com.qa/emerging-tech): IoT, blockchain, AR/VR, digital twins.
- [Industries](https://www.ict.com.qa/industries): Finance, government, healthcare, retail, telecom, manufacturing.
- [Partners](https://www.ict.com.qa/partners): Microsoft, Databricks, Informatica, Adobe and others.
- [Microsoft partnership](https://www.ict.com.qa/partners/microsoft): Microsoft AI Cloud Partner Program member; five Solutions Partner designations; sixteen specializations.
- [Case studies](https://www.ict.com.qa/insights/case-studies): AI research assistant, unified enterprise search, hybrid cloud on Azure VMware Solution.
- [Contact](https://www.ict.com.qa/contact): Doha office, info@ict.com.qa, +974 4440 5000.

- [Digital Transformation Consulting](https://www.ict.com.qa/services/consulting)

- [Customer Experience Platforms](https://www.ict.com.qa/services/customer-experience)
- [Managed & Support Services](https://www.ict.com.qa/services/managed-services)
